summary: Derle app full testing — backend 6/6 tests pass, frontend all core flows verified working. App migrated from GitHub to new Emergent environment and functioning correctly.

react_native_issues.issue: useNativeDriver warning in web preview: 'native animated module is missing, falling back to JS'. This is expected/normal for Expo web preview — not a real bug.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All flows verified: welcome overlay, guest bypass, note add + local fallback categorization (Alışveriş), organize screen with expand/collapse, edit sheet via note tap, settings screen, dark/light/system theme toggle, backend health + AI organize fallback. AI key is intentionally absent — local fallback is working by design.
